# Celestial Timekeepers
## Scripture
"But do not forget this one thing, dear friends: With the Lord a day is like a thousand years, and a thousand years are like a day." - 2 Peter 3:8

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we're reminded of the celestial timekeepers that mark the passage of time. The stars, planets, and galaxies all move in harmony, keeping perfect rhythm with the universe's grand symphony. Yet, in the midst of this precision, we're reminded that God's perception of time is vastly different from ours. A day can be like a thousand years, and a thousand years can be like a day. This mind-boggling concept encourages us to trust in God's sovereignty over time and eternity.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the celestial timekeepers, we're humbled by Your transcendent perspective on time. Help us to trust in Your wisdom and timing, even when our own understanding is limited. May we find comfort in the fact that You are the Lord of eternity, and that Your plans are unfolding with perfect precision. As we navigate the seasons of our lives, remind us to keep our eyes fixed on You, the Author of time itself. May Your timeless love and grace guide us every step of the way. Amen.
